name: Nutritionix API
description: The Nutritionix API provides access to the world's largest verified nutrition database. It supports natural language food and exercise queries, branded and common food search, detailed nutrient data retrieval, and exercise calorie estimation. The API powers nutrition tracking applications with comprehensive USDA and restaurant nutrition data.
